3110580.name: Anxiety Bot in Space!
3110580.description:
Anxiety Bot in Space! is a reimagining of an old school arcade game. The premise is simple, You must help Anxiety Bot survive as long as possible. As time progresses and your score increases, so will the meteor field!

Collect Powerups to prolong your run as long as possible! But Beware! There are debuffs that could cause you some problems along the way! There are currently three power ups and two debuffs. Triple shot for when you feel overwhelmed. Ghost mode for when you need a quick escape. Rapid Fire when you want a bullet hell.

Debuffs include: Engine Failure that'll completely halt your movement while Anxiety Bot fixes it. A wiring mishap that Reverses your controls will definitely cause some chaos. Will you be able to adapt and overcome?

How long will Anxiety Bot survive with you at the helm?
3110580.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
